name: aggregation_workflow_fsm:ENTITY_MODEL_VAR:ENTITY_VERSION_VAR:CHAT_ID_VAR
description: A finite state machine representing the aggregation workflow with three sequential steps: mark as processed, fetch products, and compute metrics.

transitions.name: mark_entity_processed
transitions.description: Mark the entity as processed by setting workflow_processed flag.
transitions.end_state_description: Entity has been marked as processed

transitions.name: fetch_products_data
transitions.description: Fetch products data from the external API.
transitions.end_state_description: Products data has been successfully fetched

externalized_processors.name: process_fetch_products
externalized_processors.description: Fetches products data and stores it in the entity

transitions.name: compute_aggregation_metrics
transitions.description: Compute aggregation metrics based on fetched products data.
transitions.end_state_description: Aggregation metrics computed and stored in the entity

externalized_processors.name: process_compute_metrics
externalized_processors.description: Computes and updates aggregation metrics in the entity
